message:
test(fuzz): replay fuzz_cli_argv corpus through cargo test

Adds a golden regression test that walks every seed in
fuzz/corpus/fuzz_cli_argv/, decodes it through arbitrary::Unstructured
(the same decoder the fuzz target uses), and asserts parse_cli never
panics for any stored seed.

This gives us a corpus-replay guard that runs in cargo test on every
CI job without requiring cargo-fuzz to be installed — if a fuzz seed
ever regresses, the golden test catches it immediately.

The test also snapshots the corpus size, so additions or removals of
seeds surface as an explicit golden diff (regenerate with
UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_fuzz_corpus).

Wires up the `arbitrary` crate (with the `derive` feature) as a
dev-dependency — same version (1.4.2) and derive macro the fuzz
harness already uses — so the replay harness can reuse the existing
Arbitrary impls without a separate shadow type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -208,6 +208,9 @@ name = "arbitrary"
 version = "1.4.2"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "c3d036a3c4ab069c7b410a2ce876bd74808d2d0888a82667669f8e783a898bf1"
+dependencies = [
+ "derive_arbitrary",
+]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "arc-swap"
@@ -938,6 +941,7 @@ version = "0.3.7"
 dependencies = [
  "aes-gcm",
  "anyhow",
+ "arbitrary",
  "argon2",
  "arrayvec",
  "assert_cmd",
@@ -1503,6 +1507,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde_core",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "derive_arbitrary"
+version = "1.4.2"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "1e567bd82dcff979e4b03460c307b3cdc9e96fde3d73bed1496d2bc75d9dd62a"
+dependencies = [
+ "proc-macro2",
+ "quote",
+ "syn",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "derive_builder"
 version = "0.20.2"

@@ -140,6 +140,7 @@ criterion = "*"
 once_cell = "*"
 serial_test = "*"
 proptest = "*"
+arbitrary = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_yaml = "*"
 rand = "0.10"
 rand_chacha = "0.10"
